title: File for ULX3S taking too long to build
body:
Attempting to build this file for the ulx3s with yosys (current git and yosys-git-r10262.fd306b05) loops for a long time in the upper_sprites module, adding exclusive control bits, and flattening. The code for the de10nano compiles as expected very quickly in quartus.

Building via yosys takes nearly an hour, with quartus less than 10 minutes.

https://github.com/rob-ng15/Silice-Playground/tree/master/YOSYS-ISSUE contains the build.v and yosys-output.txt ( in gzip )(extracted from https://github.com/rob-ng15/Silice-Playground/tree/master/j1eforth)

Until recently this was building at about the same speed with yosys as with quartus.
